---
title: "6_metastatic_dataset_TVRs"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
  freeze: auto
---

# Setup

```{r setup}
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(readxl)

data <- read_xlsx(here('data', 'processed', 'metastatic_red_edit_singleton_dist.xlsx'))

clean_data <- data %>% 
  select(mixed_def, cancer_type, primary_tumor_type, tumor_tf_rate, blood_tf_rate, TCAGGG_singleton_dist, TGAGGG_singleton_dist, TTGGGG_singleton_dist, TTCGGG_singleton_dist, TTTGGG_singletons_norm_by_all_reads, ATAGGG_singleton_dist, CTAGGG_singleton_dist, GTAGGG_singleton_dist, TAAGGG_singleton_dist, gene)
# add gene mutations columns
```
